title: Junior Revenue Manager at Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd!
